###############################################################################
#  KEYBINDINGS — ohmychadwm (AZERTY)
#  Source: etc/skel/.config/ohmychadwm/chadwm/config.def.h + etc/skel/.config/ohmychadwm/sxhkd/sxhkdrc
#  AZERTY variant (shipped default). Swapped by ohmychadwm-keyboard-layout — DO NOT EDIT BY HAND
###############################################################################

── 1. Applications & Launchers ───────────────────────────────────────────────
  super + Return            alacritty (terminal)
  super + KP_Enter          alacritty (terminal)
  super + t                 alacritty (terminal)
  super + shift + Return    thunar (file manager)
  super + shift + KP_Enter  thunar (file manager)
  super + e                 code
  super + v                 pavucontrol
  super + r                 rofi (drun launcher)
  super + space             rofi (drun launcher)
  super + d                 rofi (drun launcher)
  super + F11               rofi (drun launcher, fullscreen)
  super + F12               rofi (drun launcher)
  super + shift + d         dmenu_run
  super + alt + space       ohmychadwm menu
  super + ctrl + s          kiro-keybindings (cheatsheet)
  super + F1                vivaldi-stable
  super + F2                code
  super + F3                inkscape
  super + F4                gimp
  super + F5                meld
  super + F6                vlc
  super + F7                virtualbox
  super + F8                thunar
  super + F9                lollypop
  super + F10               spotify
  super + ctrl + space      variety --selector (wallpaper selector)
  alt + t                   variety -t (trash wallpaper)
  alt + n                   variety -n (next wallpaper)
  alt + p                   variety -p (previous wallpaper)
  alt + f                   variety -f (favorite wallpaper)
  alt + Left                variety -p (previous wallpaper)
  alt + Right               variety -n (next wallpaper)
  alt + Up                  variety --toggle-pause
  alt + Down                variety --resume
  alt + shift + t           variety -t + wal (trash wallpaper + pywal)
  alt + shift + n           variety -n + wal (next wallpaper + pywal)
  alt + shift + p           variety -p + wal (previous wallpaper + pywal)
  alt + shift + f           variety -f + wal (favorite wallpaper + pywal)
  alt + shift + u           wal (update pywal colors)
  alt + r                   rofi-theme-selector
  alt + F2                  xfce4-appfinder --collapsed
  alt + F3                  xfce4-appfinder
  F12                       alacritty (terminal)
  ctrl + alt + Return       alacritty (terminal)
  ctrl + alt + t            alacritty (terminal)
  ctrl + alt + End          alacritty -e btop
  ctrl + alt + a            alacritty-tweak-tool
  ctrl + alt + q            alacritty-tweak-tool
  ctrl + alt + d            obs
  ctrl + alt + e            archlinux-tweak-tool
  ctrl + alt + b            brave
  ctrl + alt + c            chromium
  ctrl + alt + g            chromium
  ctrl + alt + f            firefox
  ctrl + alt + p            pamac-manager
  ctrl + alt + m            mintstick -m iso
  ctrl + alt + ,            mintstick -m iso
  ctrl + alt + u            pavucontrol
  ctrl + alt + s            spotify
  ctrl + alt + v            vivaldi-stable
  ctrl + alt + o            opera

── 2. Window Management ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  super + f                 toggle fullscreen
  super + q                 close focused window
  super + shift + q         close focused window
  super + shift + c         close focused window
  super + ctrl + q          close all windows
  super + shift + j         move window down the stack
  super + shift + k         move window up the stack
  super + ctrl + j          rotate stack forward
  super + ctrl + k          rotate stack backward
  super + Tab               view previous tag
  super + Left              shift view to previous tag
  super + Right             shift view to next tag
  super + alt + o           increase window opacity
  super + alt + shift + o   decrease window opacity
  super + shift + Escape    xkill
  ctrl + alt + Delete       close all windows

── 3. Workspaces / Tags / Groups ──────────────────────────────────────────────
  super + 1..9              view tag 1..9
  super + ctrl + 1..9       toggle view of tag 1..9
  super + shift + 1..9      move window to tag 1..9
  super + ctrl + shift + 1..9  toggle tag 1..9 on window
  super + agrave            view all tags
  super + shift + agrave    move window to all tags

── 4. Layout & Tiling ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  super + i                 increase master count
  super + n                 decrease master count
  super + h                 shrink master area
  super + l                 grow master area
  super + shift + h         grow client factor
  super + shift + l         shrink client factor
  super + shift + o         reset client factor
  super + b                 toggle bar
  super + shift + space     toggle bar
  super + ctrl + t          toggle gaps
  super + ctrl + w          toggle tab mode
  super + ctrl + shift + Return  zoom (promote to master)
  super + ctrl + i          increase gaps
  super + ctrl + d          decrease gaps
  super + shift + i         increase inner gaps
  super + ctrl + shift + i  decrease inner gaps
  super + ctrl + o          increase outer gaps
  super + ctrl + shift + o  decrease outer gaps
  super + ctrl + section    increase inner horizontal gaps
  super + ctrl + shift + section  decrease inner horizontal gaps
  super + ctrl + egrave     increase inner vertical gaps
  super + ctrl + shift + egrave  decrease inner vertical gaps
  super + ctrl + exclam     increase outer horizontal gaps
  super + ctrl + shift + exclam  decrease outer horizontal gaps
  super + ctrl + ccedilla   increase outer vertical gaps
  super + ctrl + shift + ccedilla  decrease outer vertical gaps
  super + ctrl + shift + d  default gaps
  super + ctrl + F1         set layout dwindle
  super + ctrl + F2         set layout tile
  super + ctrl + F3         set layout spiral
  super + ctrl + F4         set layout deck
  super + ctrl + F5         set layout bottom stack
  super + ctrl + F6         set layout bottom stack horizontal
  super + ctrl + F7         set layout grid
  super + ctrl + F8         set layout nrow grid
  super + ctrl + F9         set layout horizontal grid
  super + ctrl + F10        set layout gapless grid
  super + ctrl + F11        set layout centered master
  super + ctrl + F12        set layout centered floating master
  super + ctrl + p          cycle layout previous
  super + ctrl + m          cycle layout next
  super + shift + minus     decrease border size
  super + shift + p         increase border size
  super + shift + w         reset border size

── 5. Multi-monitor ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  super + comma             focus previous monitor
  super + semicolon         focus next monitor
  super + shift + Left      send window to previous monitor
  super + shift + Right     send window to next monitor

── 6. Multimedia & Hardware ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
  XF86AudioLowerVolume      pactl set-sink-volume -5%
  XF86AudioMute             pactl set-sink-mute toggle
  XF86AudioRaiseVolume      pactl set-sink-volume +5%
  XF86MonBrightnessUp       light -A 5
  XF86MonBrightnessDown     light -U 5
  XF86AudioRaiseVolume      pamixer -i 10
  XF86AudioLowerVolume      pamixer -d 10
  XF86AudioMute             pamixer -t
  XF86AudioPlay             playerctl play-pause
  XF86AudioNext             playerctl next
  XF86AudioPrev             playerctl previous
  XF86AudioStop             playerctl stop
  XF86MonBrightnessUp       xbacklight -inc 10
  XF86MonBrightnessDown     xbacklight -dec 10

── 7. Screenshots ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  super + ctrl + u          maim full screen to clipboard
  super + u                 maim region select to clipboard
  Print                     scrot (save to Pictures)
  ctrl + Print              xfce4-screenshooter
  ctrl + shift + Print      gnome-screenshot -i
  ctrl + super + Print      flameshot gui

── 8. System & Session ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  super + x                 archlinux-logout
  super + shift + x         edu-powermenu
  super + Escape            ohmychadwm menu (system)
  alt + x                   ohmychadwm menu (system)
  alt + shift + x           ohmychadwm menu (system)
  super + shift + s         reload sxhkd
  super + g                 toggle compositor (fastcompmgr)
  super + p                 toggle compositor (picom)
  ctrl + alt + k            archlinux-logout
  ctrl + alt + l            archlinux-logout
  ctrl + shift + Escape     xfce4-taskmanager
  ctrl + alt + shift + F1   update-system
  super + ctrl + shift + F1  update-system
  super + shift + r         restart ohmychadwm
  super + ctrl + shift + r  rebuild ohmychadwm (rebuild.sh)
  ctrl + alt + shift + Delete  quit ohmychadwm
